name: cc-pensador
description: Pensador: PRD workflow skill and /pensador command for Claude Code. Guides LLMs through 8 sequential stages to produce high-quality Product Requirements Documents, with skill-driven brainstorm passes (requirements-clarity, backend-development, ui-ux-pro-max, frontend-design) and coordination with Codex and AGY/Gemini sub-agents.

plugins.name: cc-pensador
plugins.description: Pensador skill + /pensador slash command that drive an 8-stage PRD workflow: PRD_BASE generates a PRD base from the Strict PRD Schema; EXPAND adds candidate requirements; CLARITY/BACKEND/UIUX/FRONTEND run skill-driven brainstorm passes (requirements-clarity, backend-development, ui-ux-pro-max, frontend-design) to harden PRD integrity; CODEX delegates to Codex (effort high); AGY delegates to AGY (gemini-3.1-pro-high) for product-gap analysis; FINAL delivers prd.md, userhistory.md, and comunication_json.md. All dialogue routes exclusively through AskUserQuestion.
